title: begonia angulata
intro: Begonia angulata, a species of flowering plant, is native to tropical regions of Asia and belongs to the Begoniaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Begonia angulata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health conditions.
